name: codex-claude-bridge
title: Codex × Claude Bridge
tagline: Adversarial code review and execution rescue powered by OpenAI Codex, inside Claude Code.
description: A Claude Code marketplace plugin that wraps OpenAI Codex as an adversarial reviewer and execution-rescue tool. Five slash commands mirror the OpenAI reference plugin to preserve muscle memory; the flagship /codex:adversarial-review hard-codes a 7-attack-surface taxonomy (Authentication, Data loss, Rollbacks, Race conditions, Degraded dependencies, Version skew, Observability gaps) and emits structured JSON that Claude plan mode can re-read for closed-loop fixes. Authentication is browser OAuth tied to your existing ChatGPT account — no API key required.

telemetry.policy: No telemetry, no analytics, no remote logging. All logs are local-only.
